programs.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programs.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programs.title: A Current Affair
programs.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programs.title: Today Early News
programs.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.
